title.ko: 청소 일반; 오염방지 일반
title.en: CLEANING IN GENERAL; PREVENTION OF FOULING IN GENERAL

definition.ko: 사용하는 수단에 특징이 있는 청소 B08B1/00, B08B3/00, B08B5/00, B08B6/00, B08B7/00 중공물, 유연한 또는 섬세한 물품의 청소 B08B9/00, B08B11/00 부속품 또는 기구의 세부 B08B13/00 오염방지 또는 먼지 또는 연무의 배출방지 B08B15/00, B08B17/00

title.ko: 도구를 사용하는 방법에 의한 세척(속이 빈 제품을 특별히 적합한 방법 또는 장치로 세척 B08B9/00)
title.en: Cleaning by methods involving the use of tools   (cleaning hollow articles by methods or apparatus specially adapted thereto B08B0009000000)

title.ko: 청소 도구의 유형에 따라 특징
title.en: characterised by the type of cleaning tool
Brushes

title.ko: 물티슈, 흡수성 부재, 예. 면봉 또는 스펀지(액체 분배용 통합 수단 포함 B08B1/40)
title.en: Wipes; Absorbent members, e.g. swabs or sponges  (with integrated means for dispensing fluids B08B0001400000)
Rigid blades, e.g. scrapers; Flexible blades, e.g. wipers
Cleaning of moving articles, e.g. of moving webs or of objects on a conveyor
by movement of cleaning members over a surface
using rotary cleaning members
rotating about an axis parallel to the surface
rotating about an axis orthogonal to the surface

title.ko: 유체를 분사할 수 있는 수단이 통합된 청소 도구, 예. 물, 스팀 또는 세제 (제트 또는 스프레이의 힘으로 청소 B08B3/02)
title.en: Cleaning tools with integrated means for dispensing fluids, e.g. water, steam or detergents  (cleaning by the force of jets or sprays B08B0003020000)
involving cleaning of the cleaning members
using fluids
using mechanical tools

title.ko: 액체 또는 증기의 사용과 존재를 포함하는 방법에 의한 청소(B08B 9/00이 우선)
title.en: Cleaning by methods involving the use or presence of liquid or steam (B08B0009000000 takes precedence)
Cleaning by the force of jets or sprays
Cleaning involving contact with liquid
using perforated drums in which the article or material is placed
the liquid having chemical or dissolving effect
with additional treatment of the liquid or of the object being cleaned, e.g. by heat, by electricity or by vibration
by sonic or ultrasonic vibrations
Removing waste, e.g. labels, from cleaning liquid

title.ko: 공기 유동 또는 가스 유동을 사용하는 방법에 의한 청소 (특히 적합한 방법 또는 장치를 통한 중공 물품의 청소 B08B9/00)
title.en: Cleaning by methods involving the use of air flow or gas flow   (cleaning hollow articles by methods or apparatus specially adapted thereto B08B0009000000)
Cleaning by the force of jets, e.g. blowing-out cavities
Cleaning by suction, with or without auxiliary action
Cleaning by electrostatic means
Cleaning by methods not provided for in a single other subclass or a single group in this subclass
by distortion, beating, or vibration of the surface to be cleaned
by a combination of operations

title.ko: 특히 중공물품에 적합한 방법 또는 장치에 의한 중공물품의 청소
title.en: Cleaning hollow articles by methods or apparatus specially adapted thereto

title.ko: 파이프, 튜브 또는 파이프 또는 튜브시스템의 청소(화학적인 방법에 의한 금속파이프의 청소장치 C23G 3/04)
title.en: Cleaning pipes or tubes or systems of pipes or tubes (apparatus for cleaning metal pipes by chemical methods C23G0003040000)
Cleaning the external surfaces

title.ko: 내면청소; 막힘제거
title.en: Cleaning the internal surfaces; Removal of blockages

title.ko: 유체의 기계적 작용에 의한 것 예, 폴리싱에 의한 것(B08B 9/04가 우선)
title.en: by the mechanical action of a moving fluid, e.g. by flushing (B08B0009040000 takes precedence)
by suction

title.ko: 파이프를 따라서 진입하고 이동하는 청소장치의 사용에 의한 것
title.en: using cleaning devices introduced into and moved along the pipes

title.ko: 외부의 동력으로 작동되는 기계적 링크기구에 의하여 이동되는 것 예, 파이프를 통해서 진퇴하는 것
title.en: moved by externally powered mechanical linkage, e.g. pushed or drawn through the pipes

title.ko: 움직이는 동안에 회전되는 청소장치(B08B 9/047이 우선)
title.en: the cleaning devices being rotated while moved (B08B0009047000 takes precedence)
the cleaning devices having motors for powering cleaning tools
having self-contained propelling means for moving the cleaning devices along the pipes
the cleaning devices having motors for powering cleaning tools
moved along the pipes by a fluid, e.g. by fluid pressure or by suction
the cleaning devices conforming to, or being conformable to, substantially the cross-section of the pipes, e.g. pigs or moles
the cleaning devices being entrained discrete elements, e.g. balls, grinding elements, brushes

title.ko: 용기의 청소, 예. 탱크의 청소
title.en: Cleaning of containers, e.g. tanks

title.ko: 공구의 사용을 포함한 방법에 의한 것, 예. 브러시, 긁는 도구를 사용하는 것(B08B 9/20이 우선)
title.en: by methods involving the use of tools, e.g. brushes, scrapers (B08B0009200000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 제트 또는 스프레이의 힘에 의한 것(B08B 9/20이 우선)
title.en: by the force of jets or sprays (B08B0009200000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 용기(예. 병, 항아리, 깡통) 위 또는 속에 장치를 사용한 것
title.en: by using apparatus into or on to which containers, e.g. bottles, jars, cans, are brought
the apparatus cleaning by soaking alone
and having conveyors
Rotating conveyors
the apparatus cleaning by splash, spray or jet application, with or without soaking
and having conveyors
Rotating conveyors
Arrangement of conduits or nozzles
the apparatus cleaning by using brushes

title.ko: 스크레이퍼, 체인, 작살, 모래 또는 기타 연마수단에 의한 청소장치(연마입자분사 일반 B24C)
title.en: the apparatus cleaning by using scrapers, chains, grains of shot, sand or other abrasive means (abrasive blasting in general B24C)
the apparatus cleaning by burning out
the apparatus being characterised by means for conveying or carrying containers therethrough
the means being for loading or unloading the apparatus
Inspecting cleaned containers for cleanliness

title.ko: 특히 유연한 또는 섬세한 물품에 적합한 방법 또는 장치에 의한 유연한 또는 섬세한 물품의 청소
title.en: Cleaning flexible or delicate articles by methods or apparatus specially adapted thereto
Devices for holding articles during cleaning
specially adapted for plate glass, e.g. prior to manufacture of windshields
Accessories or details of general applicability for machines or apparatus for cleaning
Preventing escape of dirt or fumes from the area where they are produced; Collecting or removing dirt or fumes from that area
using chambers or hoods covering the area
from a small area, e.g. a tool
Methods preventing fouling
Preventing deposition of fouling or of dust
by using removable coverings
by giving articles subject to fouling a special shape for arrangement
